[[Lady/Legends|Lady]] '''Trevael''' was a [[Sevari]] [[spice lord]] in the mountainous [[Northern Frontier]] of the northern hemisphere of [[Sevarcos II]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She and her people operated [[Spice/Legends|spice]] mines autonomously, preferring not to make any deals with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
Trevael was the leader of a clan on the northern hemisphere of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sevarcos II]]. Her clan operated [[Spice/Legends|spice]] mines. Her people were rugged and preferred to mine the spice themselves in order to avoid interference by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] that wanted her to use prison labor to mine.<ref name="FTS" />

==Personality and traits==
Trevael was a beautiful [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who had a serious manner about her. Her dark beauty had a persuasive impact on those who met her, and she was able to use her appearance to keep her mining operations autonomous from Imperial entanglements.<ref name="FTS" />

==Skills and abilities==
Trevael was talented with her [[flashpistol]]s as well as her [[wind rider]]. She would compete in various wind rider races that were held on Sevarcos II against other clans. She was also deadly with a [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]] and she would not hesitate to jump into battle if one of her ships fell under attack.<ref name="FTS" />

==Equipment==
Trevael carried a flashpistol and a vibroblade with her. She also owned the ''[[Carsunum Chariot]]'' that she would use in wind rider races.<ref name="FTS" />

==Appearances==
